categories.name: Data Fetching
categories.description: Declarative HTTP requests via HTML attributes

categories.name: Styling
categories.description: Dynamic CSS classes and inline styles

categories.name: Head Management
categories.description: Reactive document head directives (title, meta, canonical, JSON-LD)

directives.name: base
directives.description: Set API base URL for all descendant HTTP directives

examples.description: Set base URL for all fetch directives

directives.name: get
directives.description: Fetch data via HTTP GET request

examples.description: Fetch and display a list of users

directives.name: post
directives.description: Submit data via HTTP POST request

examples.html:
<form post="/login" body="{ email, password }" as="result">
  <input model="email">
  <input model="password" type="password">
  <button>Login</button>
</form>

directives.name: put
directives.description: Update data via HTTP PUT request

directives.name: patch
directives.description: Partial update via HTTP PATCH request

directives.name: delete
directives.description: Delete data via HTTP DELETE request

directives.name: as
directives.description: Name for fetched data in the local context

directives.name: body
directives.description: Request body for POST/PUT/PATCH requests

directives.name: headers
directives.description: Custom request headers

directives.name: params
directives.description: Query parameters appended to the URL

directives.name: cached
directives.description: Cache HTTP responses. Options: memory (default), local (localStorage), session (sessionStorage)

directives.name: into
directives.description: Write response to a named global store

directives.name: debounce
directives.description: Debounce reactive URL refetches (milliseconds)

directives.name: retry
directives.description: Override global retry count for this request

directives.name: retry-delay
directives.description: Override global retry delay in ms (default: 1000)

directives.name: state
directives.description: Create local reactive state on an element

directives.name: store
directives.description: Define or access a global reactive store

directives.name: computed
directives.description: Derived reactive value, recomputed when dependencies change

directives.name: watch
directives.description: React to value changes by executing an expression

directives.name: persist
directives.description: Persist state to localStorage or sessionStorage

directives.name: persist-key
directives.description: Custom localStorage/sessionStorage key for persisted state

directives.name: persist-fields
directives.description: Comma-separated list of state fields to persist selectively

directives.name: model
directives.description: Two-way binding for input elements

examples.html: Hello, !

directives.name: bind
directives.description: One-way data binding — sets element textContent

directives.name: bind-html
directives.description: Set innerHTML (sanitized) from an expression

directives.name: bind-*
directives.description: Bind any HTML attribute to an expression

directives.name: if
directives.description: Conditionally render element (removes from DOM when false)

directives.name: else-if
directives.description: Chained conditional following an if

directives.name: then
directives.description: Template to render when condition is truthy

directives.name: else
directives.description: Template to render when condition is falsy, or fallback block after if

directives.name: show
directives.description: Toggle element visibility via CSS display (element stays in DOM)

directives.name: hide
directives.description: Inverse of show — hides element when condition is true

directives.name: switch
directives.description: Switch/case rendering based on a value

directives.name: case
directives.description: Case match inside a switch block

directives.name: default
directives.description: Default case inside a switch block

directives.name: each
directives.description: Simple loop — iterates over an array

directives.name: foreach
directives.description: Extended loop with advanced features (template, filter, sort, limit, offset)

directives.name: from
directives.description: Source array for foreach loop

directives.name: template
directives.description: Template ID to clone for each iteration in foreach

directives.name: index
directives.description: Variable name for the current index in foreach

directives.name: key
directives.description: Unique key for efficient list diffing

directives.name: filter
directives.description: Filter expression for foreach — only render matching items

directives.name: sort
directives.description: Sort property for foreach

directives.name: limit
directives.description: Maximum number of items to render in foreach

directives.name: offset
directives.description: Number of items to skip in foreach

directives.name: on:*
directives.description: Event handler — supports all DOM events plus lifecycle hooks
directives.notes: Modifiers: .prevent, .stop, .once, .self. Key modifiers: .enter, .escape, .tab, etc. Lifecycle: on:mounted, on:unmounted

directives.name: class-*
directives.description: Toggle a CSS class based on a condition

directives.name: class-map
directives.description: Apply multiple CSS classes from an object expression

directives.name: style-*
directives.description: Set an inline style property

directives.name: style-map
directives.description: Apply multiple inline styles from an object expression

directives.name: validate
directives.description: Enable validation on a form or field. Built-in validators: required, email, url, min, max, custom
directives.notes: $form context provides: valid, dirty, touched, errors, firstError, errorCount, fields, values, pending, reset()

directives.name: route
directives.description: Define a route or create a navigation link

directives.name: route-view
directives.description: Route outlet that renders the matched route template
directives.notes: src: directory for file-based routing. route-index: filename for root '/'. ext: file extension (default .tpl, fallback .html)

directives.name: guard
directives.description: Route guard — prevents navigation if condition is falsy

directives.name: route-active
directives.description: CSS class added to active route links

directives.name: lazy
directives.description: Control when route templates are fetched. 'ondemand': load on first visit. 'priority': load before everything else.

directives.name: animate
directives.description: Apply CSS animation on element entry

directives.name: animate-enter
directives.description: CSS animation for entering the DOM

directives.name: animate-leave
directives.description: CSS animation for leaving the DOM

directives.name: animate-duration
directives.description: Animation duration in milliseconds

directives.name: animate-stagger
directives.description: Stagger delay between animated list items

directives.name: transition
directives.description: Apply CSS transition class for route/conditional changes

directives.name: drag
directives.description: Make an element draggable

directives.name: drag-type
directives.description: Data type identifier for drag operations

directives.name: drag-effect
directives.description: Allowed drag effect: move, copy, link, or all

directives.name: drag-handle
directives.description: CSS selector to restrict drag initiation to a handle element

directives.name: drag-disabled
directives.description: Disable drag conditionally

directives.name: drag-class
directives.description: CSS class added to source element while dragging

directives.name: drag-group
directives.description: Scope drag to a named group

directives.name: drop
directives.description: Make an element a drop zone

directives.name: drop-accept
directives.description: Restrict which drag types are accepted

directives.name: drop-effect
directives.description: Visual feedback effect on drop zone

directives.name: drop-class
directives.description: CSS class added to drop zone on valid drag-over

directives.name: drop-disabled
directives.description: Disable drop conditionally

directives.name: drop-max
directives.description: Maximum number of items in drop zone

directives.name: drop-sort
directives.description: Enable positional sorting within drop zone

directives.name: drag-list
directives.description: Create a sortable list bound to a state array

directives.name: drag-multiple
directives.description: Enable lasso/multi-select on children

directives.name: t
directives.description: Translate element content using an i18n key

directives.name: t-*
directives.description: Pass parameters to translation strings

directives.name: t-html
directives.description: Render translation value as sanitized HTML instead of plain text. Companion to `t`.

directives.name: ref
directives.description: Named element reference accessible from context

directives.name: call
directives.description: Trigger an API call on click, with loading/error/success templates

examples.description: API call with loading state and redirect

directives.notes: Supports: method, body, headers, loading, error, success, redirect, confirm, as. AbortController switchMap on re-click.

directives.name: trigger
directives.description: Emit a custom event from the element

directives.name: use
directives.description: Instantiate a template inline

directives.name: include
directives.description: Synchronously clone an inline template into the current position

directives.name: page-title
directives.description: Reactively set the document <title>. Place on a <div hidden> host element.

examples.description: Dynamic page title from reactive state

directives.notes: Watches the expression and updates <title> whenever the reactive context changes. Priority 1.

directives.name: page-description
directives.description: Reactively set <meta name="description"> in <head>. Creates the tag if absent.

examples.description: Dynamic meta description from product data

directives.notes: Watches the expression and updates the meta content whenever the reactive context changes. Priority 1.

directives.name: page-canonical
directives.description: Reactively set <link rel="canonical"> in <head>. Creates the tag if absent.

examples.description: Dynamic canonical URL from product slug

directives.notes: Watches the expression and updates the canonical href whenever the reactive context changes. Priority 1.

directives.name: page-jsonld
directives.description: Reactively set <script type="application/ld+json" data-nojs> in <head>. Value is an expression evaluating to an object (JSON.stringify applied) or a JSON string with {interpolation} placeholders.
directives.notes: The data-nojs marker distinguishes the managed tag from hand-written JSON-LD so they can coexist. Priority 1.

directives.name: error-boundary
directives.description: Error boundary — renders fallback template on error
